acquisition method: data-dependent acquisition of MS1 spectra were collected at 120,000 resolution
cleavage agent: digested overnight with endopeptidase LysC and trypsin
fragmentation method: after higher energy dissociation (HCD) and/or electron-transfer dissociation (ETD)
instrument: on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: ionized with 2.4-kV electrospray ionization voltage from a nano-ESI source
labeling: mass spectrometry-based proteomics of tau filaments
reduction reagent: 1 mM Dithiothreitol, and a protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail
